product: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines has been renamed to Lakeflow Spark Declarative…
tagline: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines has been renamed to Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines.
what_it_does: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines has been renamed to Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines. Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines (SDP) is a framework for creating batch and streaming data pipelines in SQL and Python. Lakeflow SDP extends and is interoperable with Apache Spark Declarative Pipelines, while running on the performance optimized Databricks Runtime.
why_it_matters: Lakeflow SDP extends and is interoperable with Apache Spark Declarative Pipelines, while running on the performance optimized Databricks Runtime.

key_takeaway: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines has been renamed to Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines.
